summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Multi-Slot Booking Configuration feature with embeddable public booking page. All 10 requested features tested and verified working correctly. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows working correctly.

issues: Logo image shows broken image placeholder when logo_url is invalid (https://example.com/logo.png) - minor cosmetic issue

critical_code_review_comments: SlotConfig model correctly implements customer_fields and branding with proper defaults
Public booking API correctly returns customer_fields and branding in response
PublicBooking.js correctly filters enabled customer fields with getEnabledFields()
Branding is correctly applied only for Plus Plan (isPlusPlan check)
AdminSlotBooking.js has proper 3-tab modal (General, Customer Fields, Branding)
data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Created test bookings via public booking API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-Slot Booking Configuration feature fully tested. All features working: Admin Console Slot Booking tab, slot config with customer_fields and branding, public booking page with multi-step wizard, configurable customer fields, Plus Plan branding.

admin_console_slot_booking_tab.details: Slot Booking tab visible and accessible in Admin Console sidebar

slot_config_create.details: Can create new slot config with resources, customer fields, and branding

slot_config_update.details: Can update existing slot config via PUT /api/slot-configs/{id}

slot_config_modal_tabs.details: Modal has 3 tabs: General (business type, duration, hours, resources), Customer Fields (name, phone, email, vehicle, notes with enable/required toggles), Branding (Free/Plus plan, logo, colors, font)

copy_booking_link.details: Copy Link button visible for configured outlets with online booking enabled

public_booking_page_loads.details: Public booking page loads correctly at /book/{token} with outlet info and branding

public_booking_multi_step_wizard.details: 4-step wizard: Step 1 (Date/Resource), Step 2 (Time/Service), Step 3 (Customer Details), Step 4 (Success)

configurable_customer_fields.details: Customer fields displayed based on config - Name*, Phone*, Email, Notes shown; Vehicle hidden (disabled in config)

plus_plan_branding.details: Custom business name 'Glamour Salon', custom primary color (#FF5733), custom font (Poppins) applied for Plus Plan

public_booking_api_get.details: GET /api/public/booking/{token} returns config with customer_fields and branding

public_booking_api_post.details: POST /api/public/booking/{token} creates booking successfully, returns booking_id
